acceptance_criteria.text: Design at least one richer PBQ format beyond matching, ordering, and fill-in, with a preference for hotspot/diagram, categorization, or tool-output simulation.
Implement the selected PBQ format end to end: type, grading, Practice/PBQ Lab/Mock rendering, validators, content authoring rules, and tests.
Improve PBQ review explanations for partial credit so learners can see which sub-parts were correct, missing, or wrong.
Author original PBQ content for at least one shipped track, with no exam dumps or proprietary assessment material.
Verify desktop keyboard accessibility and mobile touch usability for the new PBQ interaction, or record mobile follow-up tied to 217/218.
